metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1002
metadata.comment: Rationale: Fig1 shows by quantitative immunoEM that NFM (neurofilament medium) is mainly present in the postsynapse with also significant labelling in the presynapse compared to background labeling in mitochondria (Fig1b). Fig1A, C and D show typical examples. Similar finding are reported using fluorescence microscopy where NFM colocalises with postsynaptic marker PSD95 (Fig1g) and presynaptic marker synaptophysin (Fig1h). FigS2E shows NFM labelling by pre-embedding methods, which is quantified against the neurofilament triple knockout (FigS2i) showing that the antibody is specific.. Experimental description: M&M: "Adult male or female mice of the C57BL/6J-rich strain, aged 3 - 12 months were used in all experiments."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
